error.noConnection: It seems like you have no internet connection
error.timeout: Looks like the server is taking to long to respond, please try again in sometime
error.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

page.content: Something went wrong. We could not perform required action.

onboarding.stepOneContent: Thanks to Logpass you can safely log in to online shops, services and your accounts on different platforms
onboarding.stepTwoContent: A simple and safe way to control how much information you want to share with services that require sharing of information
onboarding.stepThreeContent: You can revoke access to your data with one click or erase all information in any give moment.

start.title: Register
start.termsAcceptInfo: By registering to the application, I accept
start.addNewDeviceInfo: Already registered but using different device?

authorize.title: Authorize operation
authorize.biometricCheckDialogContent:
This operation requires additional verification via Touch / Face ID

Please add your biometric to proceed

otpCode.title: Verify your number
otpCode.info:
Please insert the code that we just send
to provided phone number

getSafer.title: Get safer
getSafer.info: Choose preferred login method to be sure that only you have access to this account.
getSafer.biometricInfo: Allow this device to use biometrics for login verification
getSafer.codeInfoSecondary: or simply set unique PIN code

skipDialog.title: Skip step
skipDialog.content: Are you sure you do not need extra access validation?

newPin.title: Set PIN code
newPin.info: Set unique PIN code that you will use for login into application

pinSuccess.header: PIN code to the account successfully set

securedLogin.pinCodeInfo: Enter your pin code to proceed.
securedLogin.logoutInfo:
Forgot your passcode?
Log in again to unlock your account.

sessionListView.noActiveSessionsStart:
You have no active sessions for this service.
Go to
sessionListView.noHistoricalSessions: You have no historical sessions for this service.

agreementDetails.title: Agreement details
agreementDetails.revokeAgreementDialogContent:
Are you sure you want to revoke this agreement?

As this one is required, you will be automatically logged out of all sessions.

turnOffSecurity.title: Turn off security
turnOffSecurity.content:
Are you sure you want to turn this option off?

It will leave your login process without authentication.

yourData.title: Your data
yourData.personalDataEmptyList: You have no personal data added to your account.
yourData.emailEmptyList: You have no emails added to your account.
yourData.addressesEmptyList: You have no addresses added to your account.
yourData.invoiceDataEmptyList: You have no invoice data added to your account.
yourData.removeDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to remove this data?
yourData.exitDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to leave without saving?

deviceList.removeDeviceInfo: Are you sure you want to remove this device?

addNewDeviceCode.title: Add new device
addNewDeviceCode.content: If you want to add another device to your account do the following;

steps.1: Open Logpass application on new device
steps.2: After open, click Add new device

addNewDeviceCode.copy: click on the code to copy

loginReset.title: Login reset
loginReset.description: It seems like your account has been configured on other device.
loginReset.newDeviceDescription: Link this device to your account to proceed on it
loginReset.resetAccountDescription: Is this your default device or you do not recall using another one?
